description: The deterministic phase spine for the Direct-Response Sales Page Assets engine (the DR sibling of Skill 49; absorbs the n8n 'All In One Sales Page Assets' funnel family). Each P-phase names its produces_artifact, its thin _chk_sp_* preflight wrapper (DEFERS unless funnel_type == sales_page_assets), and its fail-closed gate. The orchestrator run_sales_page_assets.py runs this spine IN ORDER with no skips (front-door nonce required) and issues the signed PROCESS-CERTIFICATE only on all-phases-pass. Image gen delegates to Skill 47 (kie_image.py) or the client's own image provider; ALL GHL media + build delegate to Skill 6 (ghl_media.py / ghl_rest_canvas.py); the bump copy routes to the Skill 44 order-bump seam. CLIENT runtime uses the client's OWN providers, never Anthropic.

front_door.nonce: the run-scoped 0600 nonce keys the certificate HMAC; a direct orchestrator call without it dies AF-SP56-FRONT-DOOR
front_door.rule: NOTHING generates copy/image-prompts, calls an image provider, touches GHL, writes Docs, sends mail, or mints a certificate except THROUGH sales-page-assets-entry.sh.

labeling_grammar.owner: 56-sales-page-assets (OWNS the grammar; Skill 49 pins the reciprocal forward-ref)

phases.name: Image prompts (N, slice map, template rules) + prompt STRENGTH
Image generation (DELEGATED to Skill 47 / client image provider)
phases.delegate: 47-kie-image :: kie_image.py OR the client's OWN image provider key (operator OpenAI Assistant NOT shipped)
phases.gate: artifact presence; GHL-host provenance enforced at P4

phases.name: The 7 copy assets (main a/b, upsell a/b, downsell, high-ticket, bump)
GHL media folder + upload (DELEGATED to Skill 6; ImgBB OUT)
Deterministic sanitize + fragment-ize (NOT an LLM pass)
phases.produces_artifact: pages/*.fragment.html (naked fragments, image URLs rewritten to GHL CDN)
phases.gate: ARTIFACT-BACKED (FIX-XC-03b): every non-bump funnel-manifest step has a non-empty fragment file on disk (AF-SP56-FRAGMENT-MISSING)

phases.name: Track 1: client-editable Google Docs in the client Drive folder
phases.produces_artifact: labeled Google Docs (7 copy assets) + drive_docs.json manifest

phases.name: Track 2: build bundle (funnel-manifest.json + fragments + copy-tokens + images)
Deliver: email folder link (productionized subject)
phases.gate: ARTIFACT-BACKED (FIX-XC-03b): delivery.json has a non-test subject + folder_link (AF-SP56-DELIVER-MISSING/-SUBJECT)

phases.name: Handoff -> Skill 6 build (+ Skill 44 bump seam) -> signed certificate
phases.produces_artifact: build_receipt.json + PROCESS-CERTIFICATE.json + GHL funnel (preview -> human approval -> publish)
phases.gate: ARTIFACT-BACKED (FIX-XC-03b): build_receipt.json with non-empty preview_urls + build QC >= 8.5 (AF-SP56-BUILD-RECEIPT); THEN cert minted + self-verified (prove_sp_cert.verify); publish only after EXPLICIT HUMAN APPROVAL

command_center_board.note: FIX-IMG-04: Skill 56 cards route to the registered 'funnels' department (shared with Skill 49), NOT an unrouted 'sales-pages' catch-all column. Pinned here so the mc_board department is a machine-read choice, not a stray literal.

chk_wrappers.note: Thin (<=6-line) preflight wrappers; each DEFERS (returns OK) unless the run's funnel_type == sales_page_assets, then shells its prover.

delegation_seams.images: 47-kie-image / kie_image.py OR the client's OWN image provider (default image count RAISED to 12 so every slice fills)
delegation_seams.ghl_media: 06-ghl-install-pages / ghl_media.py (ImgBB removed from the client path)
delegation_seams.docs_track1: client Drive folder (Google Docs) — human-editable review copy
delegation_seams.client_provider_rule: CLIENT runtime tiers the client's OWN configured providers (strongest -> the 7 copy assets + QC; mid -> image prompts / HTML / JSON; cheapest -> catalog/poll). A/B = two client models OR two persona prompts on one client model. NEVER Anthropic on a client box; NEVER the operator's accounts.

AF-SP56-INTAKE-SLUG.trigger: client_slug / funnel_slug missing or not a kebab slug

AF-SP56-IMGPLAN-EMPTY.trigger: no image prompts (cannot prove slice coverage; fail-closed)

AF-SP56-IMGPLAN-EMPTY-PROMPT.trigger: a prompt has empty prompt text

AF-SP56-IMGPLAN-SLICE-EMPTY.trigger: a stage (main/upsell-1/downsell-1/high-ticket) has 0 images (legacy slice bug)

AF-SP56-PROMPT-FLOOR.trigger: an image prompt is under the 5,000 stripped-char floor (or empty)

AF-SP56-PROMPT-CEILING.trigger: an image prompt is over the 19,000 stripped-char ceiling

AF-SP56-PROMPT-DENSITY.trigger: an image prompt has < 220 distinct words (padding, not richness)

AF-SP56-PROMPT-GRADE.trigger: an image prompt is missing the brand-grade block fingerprint

AF-SP56-PROMPT-BRANDCOLOR.trigger: the client brand color (primary_brand_color) is not named in the prompt

AF-SP56-PROMPT-NEGATIVE.trigger: an image prompt has no 'Do not ...' negative block

AF-SP56-PROMPT-EMDASH.trigger: an image prompt contains an em/en dash (model-safety rule)

AF-SP56-PROMPT-TYPO.trigger: text-bearing prompt lacks a spelling-lock + baked words, or a non-text prompt lacks a no-text directive

AF-SP56-MAIN-VARIANT-MISSING.trigger: MAIN variant a or b absent

AF-SP56-MAIN-SECTION-COUNT.trigger: a MAIN variant not exactly 8 sections

AF-SP56-MAIN-SECTION-UNKNOWN.trigger: a MAIN section matches no canonical section

AF-SP56-MAIN-SECTION-ORDER.trigger: MAIN sections not in canonical ascending order

AF-SP56-MAIN-SECTION-BAND.trigger: a MAIN section's STRIPPED copy is under its SACRED per-section word_min floor (measured; FIX-XC-04c)

AF-SP56-MAIN-NO-COUNTDOWN.trigger: MAIN variant missing the mandated countdown timer

AF-SP56-MAIN-EMPTY.trigger: no MAIN-stage asset (cannot prove structure; fail-closed)

AF-SP56-UPSELL-VARIANT-MISSING.trigger: UPSELL variant a or b absent

AF-SP56-UPSELL-SECTION-COUNT.trigger: an UPSELL variant not exactly 9 sections

AF-SP56-UPSELL-SECTION-UNKNOWN.trigger: an UPSELL section matches no canonical section

AF-SP56-UPSELL-SECTION-ORDER.trigger: UPSELL sections not in the Trevor Otts order

AF-SP56-UPSELL-SECTION-BAND.trigger: an UPSELL section's STRIPPED copy is under its SACRED per-section word_min floor (measured; FIX-XC-04c)

AF-SP56-UPSELL-EMPTY.trigger: no UPSELL-stage asset (cannot prove structure; fail-closed)

AF-SP56-HIGHTICKET-EMPTY.trigger: no HIGH-TICKET asset (cannot prove band; fail-closed)

AF-SP56-BUMP-EMPTY.trigger: no BUMP asset (cannot prove band; fail-closed)

AF-SP56-BUMP-NO-CHECKBOX.trigger: bump copy does not end with the checkbox close line

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-LOCATION.trigger: no sub-account / location id (Skill 6 sub-account gate)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-ZHC.trigger: funnel/step name lacks the ZHC UPPERCASE prefix (R4)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-LABEL-GRAMMAR.trigger: an asset key / run_id violates the labeling grammar OR carries a model name (R1)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-FRAGMENT.trigger: a page step missing fragment_path (rawCustomCode must be a fragment)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-METHOD.trigger: a page step missing method_decision inputs (Skill 6 Phase-5 classifier)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-COPYTOKENS.trigger: a step missing copy_tokens / copy_md_path (verify_page fidelity)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-SEO.trigger: SEO block incomplete (founder_name / >=3 keywords / description / canonical / language en)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-THANKYOU.trigger: no thank-you step (gap must be closed)

AF-SP56-BUNDLE-BUMP-ROUTE.trigger: bump not routed to the Skill 44 seam as copy (route != SKILL44_WIDGET)

AF-SP56-FRAGMENT-MISSING.trigger: a non-bump funnel-manifest step has no non-empty fragment file on disk (FIX-XC-03b)

AF-SP56-DOCS-MISSING.trigger: drive_docs.json absent or names no client-editable Doc (FIX-XC-03b)

AF-SP56-DELIVER-SUBJECT.trigger: delivery subject still carries a leftover 'test' subject (FIX-XC-03b)

AF-SP56-BUILD-RECEIPT.trigger: build_receipt.json absent, has no preview_urls, or build QC < 8.5 (FIX-XC-03b)

AF-SP56-CERT-PHASE-GAP.trigger: phase orders not contiguous 0..N (a phase skipped)

AF-SP56-CERT-PHASE-FAIL.trigger: a phase status != pass / all_phases_pass not true

AF-SP56-CERT-SIGNATURE.trigger: HMAC signature invalid for the nonce (tamper/forgery)

AF-SP56-PROCESS-INTEGRITY.trigger: process certificate invalid -> asset stack is NOT done

AF-SP56-FRONT-DOOR.trigger: orchestrator called without the run-scoped front-door nonce

AF-SP56-CANONICAL-BYPASS.trigger: run working files hand-roll GHL REST / ImgBB / raw image createTask / mail sender / Anthropic call

AF-SP56-HASH-PIN.trigger: enforcement-core sha256 does not match SPA-PROVER-PIN.sha256

AF-SP56-INTAKE-PERSONA-LOG.trigger: persona-selection-log absent or names no registered persona slug (copywriter-persona Step-0 grounding); FIX-XC-02a fail-closed

AF-SP56-MODEL-TIER.trigger: model-content-receipt absent or authoring tier is not an execution/content tier (client's own strongest model must write copy); FIX-XC-09e

AF-SP56-MODEL-NOANTHROPIC.trigger: authoring model provider is Anthropic/Claude (client skills never use Anthropic); FIX-XC-09e
